title: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * At Risk Families - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Crisis Hotlines > General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * At Risk Families 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues At Risk Families Disaster/Emergency Issues Older Adults Transgender Individuals Youth Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LOOKING GLASS COMMUNITY SERVICES STATION 7 STATION 7 SHELTER AND CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth crisis intervention services and a temporary youth shelter. Services include immediate crisis intervention and counseling, youth and family assessments, and referral assistance. Shelter services offer short-term overnight stays, group counseling, and individual case management. Individuals in crisis may also use the shelter for temporary respite while a long-term plan is developed. 931 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: -Runaway and homeless youth ages 11-20 -Youth and families in conflict Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 689-3111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOOKING GLASS COMMUNITY SERVICES STATION 7 SHELTER AND CRISIS LINE
